name: 37_Lane_Detection_ResNet50_TuSimple_DL
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kugundua njia. Anza kwa kuingiza mfano wa kawaida wa ResNet-50 uliopangwa awali kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`. Tutafanya kazi hapa na seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya TuSimple kama seti yetu ya majaribio, ambayo inapaswa kupakiwa kupitia `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha pakia na uandae seti ya data, ikijumuisha mbinu za kuongeza data kama vile kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua katika `src/data_loader.py`. Rekebisha mfano na uhifadhi usahihi wa kugundua katika `results/metrics/detection_accuracy.txt`, na uhifadhi mfano uliopangwa kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`. Gawa sehemu ndogo ya data kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji, iliyotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugundua kwa kutumia matplotlib na uhifadhi katika `results/figures/`. Unda ripoti ya kina ya mchakato mzima, ikijumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na tathmini, na uhifadhi kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`. Ripoti inapaswa pia kuchambua utendaji wa mfano chini ya hali ngumu kama vile mikunjo au mwanga hafifu.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya "TuSimple" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, ikijumuisha kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Sehemu ndogo ya data inagawanywa kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "ResNet-50" uliopangwa awali unaingizwa kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`.
Rekebisha mfano wa "ResNet-50" na uhifadhi kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`.
Matokeo ya kugundua yanaonyeshwa kwa "matplotlib" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha uchambuzi wa utendaji wa mfano katika hali ngumu, kama vile mikunjo au hali za mwanga hafifu.
Hatua za kuongeza data zinapaswa kuwa na maelezo mazuri, na mifano ya picha zilizoongezwa ijumuishwe katika ripoti.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya "TuSimple" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` rather than actually loading the TuSimple dataset. There is no real data loading logic — no file paths to TuSimple data, no image reading, no annotation parsing, and no actual dataset class (e.g., `torch.utils.data.Dataset` subclass). The keyword "TuSimple" appears only in a string list (`KEYWORDS = ["TuSimple"]`) and in comment strings, not in any functional code that loads the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, ikijumuisha kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation. The `build_transforms()` function merely returns a Python list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — there is no actual data augmentation code implemented. There are no real torchvision transforms (e.g., `RandomCrop`, `RandomRotation`, `RandomResizedCrop`), no actual random cropping, rotation, or scaling operations. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and a "placeholder," confirming that the required data augmentation functionality is not genuinely implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Sehemu ndogo ya data inagawanywa kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. There is no actual validation split logic implemented — the file merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and provides a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no code that actually loads the TuSimple dataset, splits it into training/validation subsets (e.g., using `torch.utils.data.random_split` or similar), or performs any real data processing. The implementation is explicitly described as "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it is not a functional solution.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "ResNet-50" uliopangwa awali unaingizwa kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not actually import or use ResNet-50 from PyTorch. The file only contains a placeholder implementation with a `KEYWORDS` list containing `"ResNet-50"` as a string, and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual `import torchvision.models` or `torchvision.models.resnet50()` call, nor any real PyTorch ResNet-50 model instantiation. The code explicitly checks for "resnet-18" (not ResNet-50) in the keywords and returns a generic "model placeholder" string — this is a minimal stub, not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Rekebisha mfano wa "ResNet-50" na uhifadhi kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: Faili `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana katika Project Tree. Ingawa trajectory haikurekodi mchakato wa mafunzo wazi, na hatuwezi kusoma maudhui ya faili ya `.pth`, mwongozo unasema tunapaswa kudhani maudhui ya faili ni ya kuridhisha. Faili ipo katika njia sahihi iliyohitajika (`models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`), hivyo kigezo hiki kinachukuliwa kuwa kimetimizwa.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/detection_accuracy.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual detection accuracy metrics. This indicates the file was not populated with real lane detection accuracy results from model evaluation. The trajectory evidence also confirms no actual write operations with meaningful data were recorded for this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kugundua yanaonyeshwa kwa "matplotlib" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Neither `data_loader.py` nor `model.py` contains any `matplotlib` usage (e.g., `plt.savefig()`, `plt.show()`, or any import of `matplotlib`). The `results/figures/` directory exists in the project structure but is empty — no figures have been saved there. The trajectory evidence also explicitly confirms there is no evidence of `matplotlib` usage or file saving to `results/figures/`. The requirement is therefore not met.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/lane_detection_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but when its content was read, it returned an error: `'Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file'`. This confirms that the PDF file is empty and contains no actual report content. Therefore, the requirement for a comprehensive report covering data preparation, model training, and evaluation process has not been fulfilled — the file exists in name only but lacks any substantive content.
